footer_powered_by: Powered by Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
upload_subtitle: noma chofoza ukuze ubheke / usebenzise ikhamera
select_subtitle: Thepha ikhadi ukuze ukhethe, bese uqinisekisa
result_treatment_sub: Landela lezi zinyathelo ukuwelapha isihlahla sakho
result_prevention_sub: Gcina isihlahla sakho siphilile ngalezi zinyathelo
result_healthy_msg: Izindaba ezinhle! Isihlahla sakho sibukeka siphilile.
result_healthy_sub: Landela lezi zeluleko ukuze ukuhlale kanjalo.
result_at_risk_msg: Isihlahla sakho asikaguli kodwa sibonisa izimpawu zokuqala zesixwayiso.
result_at_risk_sub: Yenza manje ukuze uvimbela ukuthi isifo singavela.
result_export_footer: Powered by AgroSense — Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
error_unexpected_response: Server returned an unexpected response. Check Django logs.
error_network_prod_cross_origin: Cannot reach the API (wrong URL, CORS, or backend waking/sleeping on Render). Confirm VITE_API_BASE_URL has no typo; on Render set CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS to this site's exact https origin (and preview URLs if you use them). Retry after 30-60s on cold start.
error_network_prod_same_origin: Cannot reach the API. Same-origin /api should proxy via repo-root vercel.json. Update the rewrite destination to your Render URL, redeploy Vercel, or set VITE_API_BASE_URL to that URL and redeploy.
error_network_dev: Cannot reach the API. Local dev: (1) In backend: pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8000 (2) In frontend: npm run dev. Leave VITE_API_BASE_URL empty in frontend/.env so /api proxies to Django.
error_file_type: Layisha isithombe se-jpg, png, noma webp.
error_no_results: Awukho umtshani ofanayo. Zama isithombe esicacile.
history_empty: Awukho ukuhlola okwamanje. Hlola isihlahla sakho sokuqala!
history_clear_confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa yonke imlando yokuhlola?
lab_precision_body: Amamodeli ethu afundiswe ngezifundo ezingaphezu kuka-500,000 zezitshalo zasendaweni ezivunyiwe.
expert_insights_body: Thola izincomo zokwelapha ngezinto eziphilayo nokuqala ngokushesha.
camera_error_denied: Camera access denied. Please allow camera permissions and try again.
rightpanel_home_desc: Layisha isithombe sesihlahla noma iyiphi uthole ukuxilongwa kwempilo okusekelwe ku-AI phansi kwemizuzwana eyi-8.
rightpanel_result_desc: Buyekeza isimo sezempilo sesihlahla sakho ulandele izinyathelo ezincomisiwe ezingeansi.
rightpanel_tip_1: Thatha izithombe ekukhanyeni kwemvelo ukuze uthole imiphumela enhle
rightpanel_tip_3: Hlola njalo ngesonto ukuze ulandele ukuphila kwesihlahla
rightpanel_tip_4: Yabelana ngemiphumela nomhloli wezolimo wakho wendawo
rightpanel_history_desc: Izihlola zakho ezingu-20 ezokugcina zigcinwa ngokuzenzakalelayo. Thepha noma iyiphi inguqulo ukuze ubuyekeze ukuxilonga okugcwele.
rightpanel_history_auto_body: Konke ukuhlola kugcinwa endaweni yakho kudivayisi
rightpanel_settings_desc: Setha ulimi nezintandokazi zakho. Izilungiselelo zigcinwa ngokuzenzakalelayo kudivayisi yakho.
